scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.caption: text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-slate-500

grid_systems.editorial_board: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/20 text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase transition-all duration-300
buttons.accent: bg-accent-600 text-white hover:bg-accent-700 rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1

cards.article: group relative bg-white border border-slate-100 p-8 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-slate-200 transition-all duration-500 flex flex-col justify-between h-full rounded-sm overflow-hidden
cards.profile: bg-slate-50 p-6 border border-slate-100 rounded-sm hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 text-center
cards.feature: p-0 bg-transparent border-l-2 border-slate-200 pl-6 hover:border-accent-600 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: rounded-none border-slate-200 focus:ring-accent-500 focus:border-accent-500 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white transition-all duration-300

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

hero.tagline: Bridging Medicine, Law, and Public Health
hero.subline: A leading peer-reviewed journal dedicated to the intersection of healthcare, legal frameworks, and global well-being.

ojs_portal.title: Access the OJS Portal
ojs_portal.description: Full access to current and archived issues, submission tracking, and peer review systems.

about.mission: To provide a platform for interdisciplinary research that shapes policy and improves global health outcomes.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot class-variance-authority' immediately.
FONTS: Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Inter' via Google Fonts in index.css.
THEME: Implement the 'Dark Sophisticated' look for the Header and Footer, but keep the Content sections (About, Articles) clean White/Light Grey for academic readability.
ACCENT: Use the Amber-600 (#d97706) sparingly for Buttons, Active States, and Borders. Do NOT overuse it.
BENTO GRID: Use a Bento Grid layout for the 'Current Issue' section. Make the main article occupy 2x2 cells.
OJS LINK: The OJS Portal link is CRITICAL. Create a dedicated, high-visibility section for it.
FORMS: Use Shadcn UI logic for the Newsletter and Contact forms, but style them with square borders (rounded-none) to match the academic aesthetic.
FOOTER: Make it large (py-20). Include columns for Policies, Contact, and Quick Links.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
